text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan asks for my help with what's
supposed to be dance lessons one day, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Eight... nine, and... ten!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Phew, that's ten sets of bicycle crunches done!
Next up is...
choice_data_list: Why are you working out now?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean? A strong core is essential for
body support when dancing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
In order to dance, I gotta warm up my hip muscles
first!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, geez, I'm sorry... Would you care to join me?
Let's get swole together!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That's what I like to hear! Let's listen to the
wonderful sound of our muscles awakening!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: One, two! Three, four! Five, six! Seven, eight!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Haha, you're really working up a sweat! I gotta
pick up my pace!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Phew! That should do it. Our muscles are warmed
up and ready to go!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: All right, let's crush these dance lessons—
choice_data_list: Hold on... a moment... I need a break...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hey! Trainer? Traineeer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I end up so exhausted that I need to lie down, but
I give Mejiro Ryan advice on her dance moves
from the floor.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry! I got a little carried away with the
workout...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Thanks for reminding me! Let's get our dance on!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: One, two! Three, four!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: And then... hit 'em with the signature pose!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan does a wonderful job, but I have one
concern...
choice_data_list:
Maybe you could make your signature pose a
little cuter.

Maybe you could make your signature pose a
little cuter.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Cuter?! I-I guess so...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I've been thinking the same, actually, and
practicing new poses in secret. I mean, just
sometimes...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?! No way, they're not worth showing...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But if I can use it in my dance... then it might be
worth it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Okay, here we go! Big smile, and... R-Ryan...
heart... and kiss...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Guh, sorry! I don't think my facial muscles are
warmed up yet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While her dancing is flawless, Mejiro Ryan could
stand to improve in other areas.
